title: zornia dyctiocarpa
intro: Zornia dyctiocarpa, also known as the "Buttercup Bush", is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Central and South America. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic effects. The health benefits associated with Zornia dyctiocarpa include its ability to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Zornia dyctiocarpa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used externally to treat skin conditions or taken internally to support overall health and well-being.
